title: calathea ornata var. regalis
intro: Calathea ornata var. regalis, also known as the Ceylon King, is a rare and beautiful ornamental plant species, characterized by its striking white and dark green foliage. Historically, the plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calathea ornata var. regalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant was prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
